attacking_style: Limited offensive capacity observed; appears to ride defensively to maintain GC position rather than initiate attacks, even on summit finishes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine clear team tactical patterns from available observations.
terrain_preference: Struggles on steep summit finishes; exposed on high-altitude climbs like Paso San Valentino where lighter climbers can distance him.
vulnerability: Summit finishes at altitude reveal clear weakness; gets distanced on steep gradients and lacks ability to respond or counter-attack when isolated.
key_patterns: Distanced on steep summit climbs, unable to follow pace of top GC contenders (2 instances)
Defensive racing focused on damage limitation rather than gaining time offensively (2 instances)
Shows vulnerability when racing gets selective at high altitude (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: consecutive stages showed declining performance, getting distanced on climbs and requiring chases to limit losses
